content:
# Semblance Measurement

**Summary**: A measure of how well a signal matches a specific model or pattern, used here to identify coherent reflections.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2009-al-lehyani|Al-Lehyani, 2009]] used semblance measurement to map the location of near-surface diffractors in the x-y plane.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The highest semblance values (e.g., 0.57154) were found at the true surface wave velocity of 1000 m/s for Model A. ([[2009-al-lehyani|Al-Lehyani, 2009, p. 40]])
